name: Daido Group Limited
summary: Daido Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides cold storage and related services in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company operates through Cold Storage and Related Services; Trading of Food and Beverage; and Money Lending Services segments. It provides warehousing and logistics services, including storage, cold storage, freight, cargo delivery, towing, devanning and loading, packaging and re-packaging, and related value-added services. The company also engages in food and beverage trading and distribution, including import, export, distribution, re-distribution, and related value-added services. In addition, it operates Urban Mart, an online shopping platform for selling daily products; provides herbal tea under the Attitude Planet brand name; and money lending services. The company is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong.
